testcase.name: test_safebooru_fetch_success
testcase.failure:
mock_aiohttp = <AsyncMock name='ClientSession().__aenter__()' id='2963692655280'> avoid_set = set()
@pytest.mark.asyncio async def test_safebooru_fetch_success(mock_aiohttp, avoid_set): # Safebooru: read() -> json() # Use MagicMock for response object to ensure sync attributes (status) work 100% xml_resp = MagicMock() xml_resp.read = AsyncMock() xml_resp.read.return_value = b'<posts count="100" offset="0"></posts>' xml_resp.status = 200
json_resp = MagicMock() json_resp.json = AsyncMock() json_resp.json.return_value = [ {"image": "img.jpg", "directory": "dir", "hash": "md5", "score": 100} ] json_resp.status = 200
cm = mock_aiohttp.get.return_value cm.__aenter__.side_effect = [xml_resp, json_resp]
res = await fetch_image_safebooru("tags", avoid_set) > assert res is not None E assert None is not None
tests\test_api_fetchers.py:41: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_gelbooru_fetch_success
testcase.failure:
mock_aiohttp = <AsyncMock name='ClientSession().__aenter__()' id='2963693504560'> avoid_set = set()
@pytest.mark.asyncio async def test_gelbooru_fetch_success(mock_aiohttp, avoid_set): # Gelbooru: text() -> json() xml_resp = MagicMock() xml_resp.text = AsyncMock() xml_resp.text.return_value = '<posts count="50" offset="0"></posts>' xml_resp.status = 200
json_resp = MagicMock() json_resp.json = AsyncMock() json_resp.json.return_value = { "post": [{"file_url": "http://img.url", "md5": "md5", "score": 10}] } json_resp.status = 200
cm = mock_aiohttp.get.return_value cm.__aenter__.side_effect = [xml_resp, json_resp]
res = await fetch_image_gelbooru("tags", avoid_set) > assert res is not None E assert None is not None
tests\test_api_fetchers.py:62: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_rule34_fetch_success
testcase.failure:
mock_aiohttp = <AsyncMock name='ClientSession().__aenter__()' id='2963693512624'> avoid_set = set()
@pytest.mark.asyncio async def test_rule34_fetch_success(mock_aiohttp, avoid_set): # Rule34: read() -> json() xml_resp = MagicMock() xml_resp.read = AsyncMock() xml_resp.read.return_value = b'<posts count="20" offset="0"></posts>' xml_resp.status = 200
json_resp = MagicMock() json_resp.json = AsyncMock() json_resp.json.return_value = [ {"file_url": "http://r34.url/img.jpg", "hash": "md5", "score": 5} ] json_resp.status = 200
cm = mock_aiohttp.get.return_value cm.__aenter__.side_effect = [xml_resp, json_resp]
res = await fetch_image_rule34("tags", avoid_set) > assert res is not None E assert None is not None
tests\test_api_fetchers.py:83: AssertionError

failure.message: TypeError: object MagicMock can't be used in 'await' expression

testcase.failure:
mock_interaction = (<AsyncMock id='2963695338224'>, <MagicMock id='2963695341920'>) mock_all_pickers_nsfw = (<AsyncMock name='pick_media' id='2963695342256'>, <AsyncMock name='pick_media' id='2963694872496'>, <AsyncMock name='pick_media' id='2963694872160'>) mock_bot_capture = (<MagicMock id='2963694871824'>, {'bounce': <MagicMock name='mock.app_commands.allowed_contexts()()' id='2963694866784...ntexts()()' id='2963694866784'>, 'succ': <MagicMock name='mock.app_commands.allowed_contexts()()' id='2963694866784'>})
@pytest.mark.asyncio async def test_nsfw_commands_success(mock_interaction, mock_all_pickers_nsfw, mock_bot_capture): bot, captured = mock_bot_capture (m_plap, m_succ, m_bounce) = mock_all_pickers_nsfw
valid_media = ("http://url.com/img.jpg", "md5", "gelbooru", MagicMock(), "img.jpg", FetchError.NONE) m_plap.return_value = valid_media m_succ.return_value = valid_media m_bounce.return_value = valid_media
# Forces fresh import logic if we deleted modules from commands import plap, succ, bounce plap.setup(bot) succ.setup(bot) bounce.setup(bot)
interaction, target = mock_interaction
> await captured["plap"](interaction, target, extra_tags=None) E TypeError: object MagicMock can't be used in 'await' expression

@pytest.mark.asyncio async def test_sfw_commands_success(mock_interaction, mock_all_pickers, mock_bot_capture): bot, captured = mock_bot_capture (m_cuddle, m_kiss, m_pat, m_hug, m_poke) = mock_all_pickers
valid_media = ("http://url.com/img.jpg", "md5", "safebooru", MagicMock(), "img.jpg", FetchError.NONE) for m in (m_cuddle, m_kiss, m_pat, m_hug, m_poke): m.return_value = valid_media
from commands import cuddle, kiss, pat, hug, poke cuddle.setup(bot) kiss.setup(bot) pat.setup(bot) hug.setup(bot) poke.setup(bot)
interaction, target = mock_interaction
> await captured["cuddle"](interaction, target, extra_tags=None) E TypeError: object MagicMock can't be used in 'await' expression

testcase.name: test_view_interactions

error.message: failed on setup with "AttributeError: <module 'views.plap_view' from 'C:\\Users\\Rohan Chopra\\Documents\\nyunzibot\\views\\plap_view.py'> does not have the attribute 'pick_media'"

testcase.error:
@pytest.fixture def mock_all_pickers_views(): p1 = patch("views.plap_view.pick_media", new_callable=AsyncMock) p2 = patch("views.cuddle_view.pick_media_sfw", new_callable=AsyncMock)
> m1 = p1.start() ^^^^^^^^^^
tests\test_views.py:10: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ C:\Program Files\WindowsApps\PythonSoftwareFoundation.Python.3.13_3.13.2544.0_x64__qbz5n2kfra8p0\Lib\unittest\mock.py:1654: in start result = self.__enter__() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Program Files\WindowsApps\PythonSoftwareFoundation.Python.3.13_3.13.2544.0_x64__qbz5n2kfra8p0\Lib\unittest\mock.py:1497: in __enter__ original, local = self.get_original() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <unittest.mock._patch object at 0x000002B209F7B690>
def get_original(self): target = self.getter() name = self.attribute
original = DEFAULT local = False
try: original = target.__dict__[name] except (AttributeError, KeyError): original = getattr(target, name, DEFAULT) else: local = True
if name in _builtins and isinstance(target, ModuleType): self.create = True
if not self.create and original is DEFAULT: > raise AttributeError( "%s does not have the attribute %r" % (target, name) ) E AttributeError: <module 'views.plap_view' from 'C:\\Users\\Rohan Chopra\\Documents\\nyunzibot\\views\\plap_view.py'> does not have the attribute 'pick_media'
C:\Program Files\WindowsApps\PythonSoftwareFoundation.Python.3.13_3.13.2544.0_x64__qbz5n2kfra8p0\Lib\unittest\mock.py:1467: AttributeError
